description: Implement monitoring and alerting for payment failure rates to ensure they remain low and maintain user trust.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the payment processing system, WHEN monitored, THEN the payment failure rate should be reported and remain below 1%.

description: Address the silent failures in payment retries due to idempotency key collisions and race conditions to prevent double charging and restore user trust.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a payment retry scenario, WHEN a retry is initiated, THEN it should succeed without silent failures in 100% of cases.

description: Optimize the checkout API to ensure that the p95 latency is reduced to meet the 500ms SLO, enhancing user experience during checkout.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a checkout API call, WHEN measured, THEN the p95 latency should be <= 500ms.

description: Fix the checkout page crashes on mobile devices when switching payment methods to prevent users from losing their cart contents.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on mobile, WHEN switching payment methods, THEN the checkout page should not crash and should retain cart contents.

description: Implement a one-click purchase flow for returning customers with saved payment methods to streamline the checkout process and improve conversion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a returning customer with saved payment methods, WHEN they initiate checkout, THEN they should see an option to complete the purchase with one click.

description: Automatically detect and apply the best available coupon or discount code at checkout to reduce friction and decrease cart abandonment.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user at checkout, WHEN eligible for a coupon, THEN the best coupon should be automatically applied without user intervention.

description: Conduct A/B testing on new checkout features to measure their impact on conversion rates and user behavior.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a new checkout feature, WHEN A/B tested, THEN the impact on conversion rates should be measurable and reported.

description: Migrate to StripeConnect to reduce transaction fees and improve international payment support, ensuring a smooth transition without impacting current features.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the migration process, WHEN completed, THEN the new payment gateway should be fully operational without impacting existing transactions.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Checkout Experience
description: Implement a mechanism to gather user feedback on the checkout experience to identify areas for improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user completes a purchase, WHEN prompted for feedback, THEN they should be able to submit their thoughts on the checkout experience.

description: Enhance the visibility of coupon application processes to address user skepticism and improve confidence in discounts.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user at checkout, WHEN a coupon is applied, THEN they should see a clear message indicating the coupon applied and the discount received.

description: Display real-time purchase activity badges during checkout (e.g., '23 people bought this in the last hour'). A/B tests on landing pages showed a 7% lift in click-through when social proof was present. Growth PM wants this rolled out to checkout flow.

12 customers reported being charged for orders that showed as 'payment failed' in the UI. Investigation shows the payment processor confirmed the charge but our system didn't receive the webhook callback due to a timeout. Refunds were issued manually but this erodes user trust.
